title: State Street® Financial Select Sector SPDR® Premium Income ETF declares $0.2421 dividend
content:
* State Street® Financial Select Sector SPDR® Premium Income ETF (XLFI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XLFI]) declares $0.2421/share monthly dividend [https://www.ssga.com/us/en/intermediary/resources/documents/etf-dividend-distributions].
 	* 30-Day SEC Yield of 1.10% as of Dec. 24.
 	* Payable Dec. 31; for shareholders of record Dec. 29; ex-div Dec. 29.
 	* See XLFI Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XLFI/dividends?source=news_bullet]
